steps.title: Use the inaccessible contrast
steps.content: The data were mostly inaccessible until a data-transfer project changed that status. The next sentence says Tanaka could make use of the information, so the blank must mean accessible or ready to use.

steps.title: Choose the usability word
steps.content: A means able to be forecast, B means difficult or complex, and C means typical or symbolic. None explains how Tanaka could use the data. The needed word is the opposite of inaccessible. The answer is D.
